calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-21-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Nici Ronich.
Kevin Lin, Esq. for Petitioner: Zhongheng Liang, also present, was sworn and examined.
Matter is ordered off-calendar, for Petitioner to file in the proper county or to file an Amended Petition with the court.
